description:
Counter-Strike 2 companion that automates in-game tasks, such as accepting match, buying items and more.



Version 2.2.7 changelog
- Fixed debug color settings maximum value to be capped at 255
- Added error message if dlls.mpf is missing
- Added logging for loaded DLLs
Full Changelog: 2.2.6...2.2.7
🛡 VirusTotal GitHub Action analysis:
- CSAuto_Installer.exe
- CSAuto_Portable.zip
